name: shopping-compare
description: Tutorial demo. Search → inspect → compare flow against a fake catalog (dummyjson.com). No approval gates. Requires BETTERCLAW_DEMO=1 to register the `shop_search` / `shop_details` / `shop_compare` tools — they're demo tools, not production.
example_agent_message: Find me a good wireless mouse under $50. Search the catalog, inspect the top two, compare them, recommend one.
